title: Unfamiliar Chests
description: Retextured the chests in the way that you wouldn't even notice but feel a little...
body:
Tired of the vanilla chest with such a messy palette but don't want to get rid of this iconic piece of art? At least that's what I felt when I noticed that recently. But no worries, this is probably the thing you're looking for.

Behold! The Unfamiliar Chests!

Well, most colors are basically just copied from the vanilla palette, so you don't feel to uncomfortable to look at it if you're used to the vanilla one enough.

Inspired by the one **[vectorwing](https://modrinth.com/user/vectorwing)** made a while ago.
